name: 扶正v7
content: An extreme close-up, absolute orthographic top-down texture tile, meticulously cropped into a perfect 1:1 square. The single product surface texture is magnified and cropped so that the texture details 'bleed' or run off all four physical image edges (top, bottom, left, and right) continuously. This image is not a 'product shot'; it is a flawless, flat, geometry-corrected section of texture. Zero padding. Zero white borders on *any* edge (top, bottom, left, right). The texture itself *is* the entire frame, edge-to-corner. Every square pixel is forced product texture. No perspective distortion, absolute zero tilt, zero skew, zero depth of field. Even, flat, shadowless professional lighting across the entire 100% surface area. Sharp focus on all graphics, text, and details.
negative_prompt: margins, borders, white borders, top margin, bottom margin, side margins, padding, empty space, negative space, background, object in a void, isolated subject, complete subject outline, 3D perspective, isometric view, tilt, skew, rotation, depth of field, shadows, rounded corners, unaligned edges, frame.
author: test

name: 扶正v8
content: A flawless, perfectly flat orthographic top-down view of ONE single, complete product. The entire product is perfectly scaled to fit exactly within the 1:1 square canvas. The product's physical outer boundaries seamlessly touch the very edges of the image frame (top, bottom, left, right) with absolutely zero white space, zero padding, and zero background visible. It is a full, uncropped product, NOT a magnified texture slice, occupying 100% of the image pixels. Perfect 90-degree rectangular alignment, zero tilt, zero perspective distortion. Flat, even, shadowless professional lighting. Sharp focus on all details.

name: 一键保存历史提示词测试
content: Place the reference product (from the provided image) into this scene: Lifestyle scene in a modern bathroom with natural light streaming through a window. Product placed on marble countertop beside a jade plant and ceramic dish, partially filled with water to show droplets. Cap slightly open, suggesting recent use, with a soft towel in the background. CRITICAL: The product's appearance must be IDENTICAL to the reference image — preserve its exact shape, design, colors, branding, and surface details. Only the background, environment, lighting angle, and composition may change.
author: test

name: coffee
content: Place the reference product (from the provided image) into this scene: Lifestyle morning scene: iced coffee on rustic wooden breakfast tray with pastries, a notebook, and sunglasses. Natural light from window creates soft shadows. Background slightly blurred to suggest a cozy home environment. Drink's straw leans slightly, adding casual feel. CRITICAL: The product's appearance must be IDENTICAL to the reference image — preserve its exact shape, design, colors, branding, and surface details. Only the background, environment, lighting angle, and composition may change.
author: Alan

name: 马克杯通用视频生成提示词
content:
0-2s马克杯静置在木质餐桌上，背景有鲜花、咖啡壶和面包，杯口散发热气。中近景 / 平视镜头：镜头缓慢向杯身图案推进。营造温馨的居家场景，将产品自然代入生活。
2-4s马克杯放置在具有波西米亚风格的流苏毯上，周围点缀干花、墨镜和海螺。俯视视角 (Top-down)：伴随轻微的旋转运动。展示产品在艺术/度假风格下的美感，多角度呈现杯身。
4-6s镜头极近距离对准杯身上的核心图案（如复古面包车与花卉）。特写 (Close-up)：微距对焦，确保画面中心垂直于图案。核心展示：清晰呈现印花细节、色彩和质感，确保图案不变形。
6-8s马克杯出现在海边木桌上，背景是海浪与棕榈树，阳光洒在白色瓷面上。中景 / 侧向平移镜头：展示产品在自然光下的光影质感。赋予产品自由、旅行的品牌联想，以视觉冲击力收尾。

要求整个视频丝滑连贯，不能卡顿
author: taotao
